# rythm-text



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Polymorphic text element with semantic color, size, weight, and truncation.
Use the `as` prop to select the rendered HTML element.

## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                                 | Type                                                                                                                    | Default     |
| ---------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `as`       | `as`       | The HTML element to render.                 | `"div" \| "em" \| "h1" \| "h2" \| "h3" \| "h4" \| "h5" \| "h6" \| "label" \| "p" \| "span" \| "strong"`                 | `'span'`    |
| `color`    | `color`    | Semantic text color.                        | `"danger" \| "disabled" \| "inherit" \| "on-brand" \| "primary" \| "secondary" \| "success" \| "tertiary" \| "warning"` | `'inherit'` |
| `size`     | `size`     | Type-scale size step.                       | `"2xl" \| "3xl" \| "base" \| "lg" \| "md" \| "sm" \| "xl" \| "xs"`                                                      | `'base'`    |
| `truncate` | `truncate` | Truncate overflowing text with an ellipsis. | `boolean`                                                                                                               | `false`     |
| `weight`   | `weight`   | Font weight.                                | `"bold" \| "medium" \| "regular" \| "semibold"`                                                                         | `'regular'` |
